name: Digital Lux Meter — 0–199999 Lux
tagline: 0–199999 Lux / 0–19999 FC digital lux meter with 4-digit backlit display, Auto/Manual ranging, Min/Max hold, data recording and 9 V battery.
description: The Vartech V 6610 B is an economical, high-quality digital lux meter with a wide 0–199999 Lux (0–19999 FC) measurement range and a 4-digit backlit LCD display. It features Auto and Manual ranging, Data Hold, Min/Max memory and a data recording facility. The instrument achieves ±4% accuracy when calibrated with a standard tungsten flat lamp at 2856 K colour temperature, and ±6% + 5 Lux for other visible light sources. Resolution steps from 0.1 Lux below 200 Lux to 1 Lux above 200 Lux, providing fine sensitivity at low light levels. A silicon photocell sensor covers the spectral range 320–730 nm with a cosine deviation of ±2% at 30°, ±6% at 60° and ±25% at 80°. Powered by a 9 V battery.
features: Accuracy: ±4% (calibrated at 2856 K)  |  ±6% + 5 Lux (other light sources)
Resolution: 0.1 Lux (< 200 Lux)  |  1 Lux (≥ 200 Lux)  |  0.01 FC (< 20 FC)  |  0.1 FC (< 200 FC)  |  1 FC (≥ 200 FC)
Data Hold  |  Min / Max hold  |  Data recording
Silicon photocell sensor  |  Spectral range: 320–730 nm  |  Auto Power Off

specs.value: ±4%  (calibrated by standard flat lamp at 2856 K colour temperature)  |  ±6% + 5 Lux  (other visible light sources)

name: Digital Lux Meter — 0.1 to 200,000 Lux
tagline: 3½-digit auto-ranging lux meter — 0.1 to 200,000 Lux with flexible detachable sensor, Lux/FC select, data hold, Min/Max and backlight.
description: The Vartech V 6610+ is a 3½-digit (2000 counts) auto-ranging digital lux meter covering 0.1 to 200,000 Lux with a 0.1 Lux minimum resolution. It features a detachable, flexible sensor head on an approximately 15 cm coiled lead that allows positioning the sensor independently of the meter body for accurate readings in confined or awkward locations. Lux/FC selection lets users switch between SI and imperial illuminance units. Auto data recording, Data Hold, and Min./Max. hold are provided. A backlit display aids reading in dimly lit environments. The instrument is supplied in a protective holster.
features: 0.1 to 200,000 Lux range  |  0.1 Lux minimum resolution
Detachable, flexible sensor — approx. 15 cm coiled lead
Auto data recording  |  Data Hold  |  Min./Max. hold
Backlit display  |  REL function  |  Holster included
